# cpp-101

<p align="left">
  <img alt="c++" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," width="700px" height="233px">
</p>

## Description 
C++ solutions to small problems, written as part of my learning and problem-solving practice.

## Structure 
* `/pf` This repo conatains the code for problems solved using fundamental concepts.  
* `/oop` This repo conatins the code for problems solved using the concepts of oop. 
* `/dsa` This repo conatins the code for problems solved using dsa concepts.
